codeReview.summary: The finalization commit addresses the earlier blocking attribution bug by matching observed requests to normalized full target URLs rather than pathname only, and it adds regression coverage proving mismatched simple-price selectors no longer count as warm-start evidence while matching requests still do.

summary: Pass: the finalized startup-prewarm work fixes the prior false-positive warm-benefit attribution problem, preserves the intended prewarm diagnostics/metrics surface, and adds targeted tests that exercise both mismatch and matching request paths for the declared prewarm target. No new blocking issues were identified in the finalization diff.
